scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black text-[#0A0A0B]
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold text-[#0A0A0B]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Utilize optical alignment and stark asymmetry.

surfaces.card: bg-white border border-[#E4E7EC] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 ease-out

buttons.primary: bg-[#002DF5] text-white hover:bg-[#0022B8] hover:text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-none font-semibold transition-colors duration-200 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0A0A0B] border border-[#E4E7EC] hover:border-[#D0D5DD] hover:bg-[#F4F5F7] hover:text-[#0A0A0B] px-8 py-4 rounded-none font-medium transition-colors duration-200
buttons.destructive: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-[#D63026] hover:text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-none font-medium transition-colors duration-200

inputs.default: w-full border border-[#E4E7EC] bg-white px-4 py-3 text-base focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002DF5] focus:border-transparent transition-all rounded-none text-[#0A0A0B]

tables.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-[#475467] border-b border-[#E4E7EC] py-4 px-4 font-semibold

images.description: Minimalist architectural abstract background for the login page, offering a high-end corporate feel. Use as full-cover background on right half of desktop layout.

accessibility_and_interactions.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a high-contrast focus ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002DF5] focus:outline-none).
accessibility_and_interactions.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-900).
accessibility_and_interactions.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-btn').

page_specific_instructions.login: Split layout. Left side: Form inside a stark white container with massive p-12 padding. Right side (hidden on mobile): `login_background` image covering the viewport with a subtle bg-black/10 overlay to increase contrast if needed.
page_specific_instructions.dashboard: Owner only. Use the 'Control Room Grid'. The top metrics should feature massive typography (using the 'Outfit' font). Inject a Recharts bar chart for 'Top Selling Items'. Strict data density.
page_specific_instructions.billing: Main Feature (Cashier). Split view: Left 70% is a grid (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) of square product cards with large tap targets. Right 30% is a sticky cart pane. The 'Generate Bill' button MUST be massive (e.g., text-xl, py-6, bg-[#002DF5]).
page_specific_instructions.products: Data-heavy. Use Shadcn Table or custom pure HTML table. Keep it cardless, sharp edges (rounded-none). Top right action area for 'Add Product'.
page_specific_instructions.bills: Chronological table of generated bills. Use crisp 1px borders between rows.
page_specific_instructions.staff: Owner only. Simple list of cashiers and an 'Add Staff' dialog.

instructions_to_main_agent: Execute commands to install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react recharts
Ensure all fonts are imported via Google Fonts in index.css.
Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom fonts ('Outfit', 'IBM Plex Sans', 'IBM Plex Mono') and the defined brand colors.
Adhere strictly to the sharp edges (rounded-none for buttons and inputs) to maintain the Swiss Brutalist/High-Contrast aesthetic.
Never use `Inter` or `Roboto`. Always use `Outfit` for headings and `IBM Plex Sans` for body.
For the Billing Page, ensure the entire layout is usable without scrolling the main window by making the left and right panels independently scrollable (h-screen, overflow-y-auto).
